name: Golden Minerals Co
summary: Golden Minerals Company is an exploration-stage mining company focused on gold, silver, and copper projects. It holds majority control in the Sarita Este/Desierto concessions in Salta Province, Argentina, a 60% interest in the Sand Canyon gold-silver project in northwestern Nevada, and other immaterial mineral exploration properties in Argentina and Mexico. The company does not currently produce or sell minerals.

products.name: Sarita Este/Desierto Project
products.description: Gold-silver-copper exploration concessions in northwest Salta Province, Argentina.

products.name: Sand Canyon Project
products.description: 60%-owned exploration-stage gold-silver project in northwestern Nevada.

partnerships.description: Joint venture being formed for the Desierto project in Argentina; documents pending completion.
Joint venture documents pending completion for the Sand Canyon project in Nevada.
